problemSummary: Explanatory decision tree (max_depth=3, gini) on home visit outcomes to surface drivers of favorable vs non-favorable visits for social-worker SOP planning — interpretability over raw predictive accuracy.
treeText:
|--- remainder__safety_concerns_noted <= 0.50
|   |--- cat__location_visited_Barangay Office <= 0.50
|   |   |--- cat__location_visited_Family Home <= 0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 1
|   |   |--- cat__location_visited_Family Home >  0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 0
|   |--- cat__location_visited_Barangay Office >  0.50
|   |   |--- remainder__has_parent <= 0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 0
|   |   |--- remainder__has_parent >  0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 0
|--- remainder__safety_concerns_noted >  0.50
|   |--- cat__location_visited_School <= 0.50
|   |   |--- cat__location_visited_Proposed Foster Home <= 0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 0
|   |   |--- cat__location_visited_Proposed Foster Home >  0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 0
|   |--- cat__location_visited_School >  0.50
|   |   |--- remainder__has_parent <= 0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 0
|   |   |--- remainder__has_parent >  0.50
|   |   |   |--- class: 0

sopChecklist.title: Safety first
sopChecklist.detail: If safety concerns are documented for this address or household, require two staff or relocate to a neutral site per agency SOP before proceeding.

sopChecklist.title: Confirm guardian attendance
sopChecklist.detail: When no parent/guardian is indicated in the visit plan, delay or reschedule until guardian attendance is confirmed unless emergency protocols apply.

sopChecklist.title: Safety screening
sopChecklist.detail: Before scheduling, confirm whether prior or contextual safety concerns are documented. The tree splits on safety flags early when they appear in historical patterns.

sopChecklist.title: Location strategy
sopChecklist.detail: Location category `location_visited_Barangay Office` appears in the tree — align site choice with assessment type (neutral vs family home vs barangay office) per agency policy.

sopChecklist.title: Location strategy
sopChecklist.detail: Location category `location_visited_Family Home` appears in the tree — align site choice with assessment type (neutral vs family home vs barangay office) per agency policy.

sopChecklist.title: Location strategy
sopChecklist.detail: Location category `location_visited_School` appears in the tree — align site choice with assessment type (neutral vs family home vs barangay office) per agency policy.

sopChecklist.title: Parental / guardian presence
sopChecklist.detail: Confirm a parent or legal guardian is expected or present when the visit plan indicates a parent role — structured guardian engagement aligns with more favorable visit patterns in this data.

sopChecklist.title: Location strategy
sopChecklist.detail: Location category `location_visited_Proposed Foster Home` appears in the tree — align site choice with assessment type (neutral vs family home vs barangay office) per agency policy.

notes: Explanatory model for rubric discussion only. Refresh by re-running this notebook's export cell or scripts/export_home_visit_sop.py.
